CVE-2020-35904.title: An issue was discovered in the crossbeam-channel crate before 0.4 ...
CVE-2020-35904.summary: An issue was discovered in the crossbeam-channel crate before 0.4.4 for Rust. It has incorrect expectations about the relationship between the memory allocation and how many iterator elements there are.

CVE-2025-4574.title: In crossbeam-channel rust crate, the internal `Channel` type's `D ...
CVE-2025-4574.summary: In crossbeam-channel rust crate, the internal `Channel` type's `Drop` method has a race condition which could, in some circumstances, lead to a double-free that could result in memory corruption.
